definition:
1. without pain , and so: 
2. of persons, insensible to pain , (Aristotle Philosopher) 
3. unfeeling, hard-hearted, ruthless , (Sophocles Tragicus); ἀναλγητότερος εἶναι to feel less grieved , (Thucydides): with genitive, ἀν. εἶναί τινος to be insensible to , (Plutarch):—;adverb -τως, unfeelingly , (Sophocles Tragicus) 
4. of things, not painful , (Sophocles Tragicus) 
5. cruel , πάθος (Euripides) (ML)
